name: CSB Bank Limited
summary: CSB Bank Limited provides various banking products and services for small and medium enterprises, retail, and NRI customers in India. It operates in four segments: Treasury, Corporate/Wholesale Banking, Retail Banking, and Other Banking Operations. The company accepts various deposits products include current accounts, savings bank accounts, corporate salary savings accounts, term deposit accounts, cumulative deposit accounts, and other deposit products, as well as products for NRI customers. It also offers term, working capital, commercial vehicle, personal, home, vehicle, education, agricultural, corporate, and gold loans; loans against properties; and export finance, import finance, bill finance, letters of credit, buyers'/suppliers' credit, bank guarantee, inland bill discounting, bills discounted under domestic letters of credit, cash management, treasury, and trade receivables discounting system bill discounting services. In addition, the company invests in sovereign and corporate debt instruments, undertakes proprietary trading in equity and fixed income securities and foreign exchange, and invests in certificate of deposits and mutual funds. Further, it provides money transfer and remittance, utility and bill payments, Internet and mobile banking, foreign exchange, insurance products distribution, safe deposit locker, and institutional fee collection services. It operates through a network of approximately 411 branches and 300 ATMs. The company was formerly known as The Catholic Syrian Bank Limited and changed its name to CSB Bank Limited in June 2019. CSB Bank Limited was incorporated in 1920 and is headquartered in Thrissur, India.
